lines: Tunisia are absolutely cooked — three games, zero points, and both Callum and Dene are standing over the grave wondering whose fault it is. Spoiler: it's both of yours.

The Foreman's Curaçao got absolutely battered 0–2 by Côte d'Ivoire, which means his entire Group E campaign is now resting on Türkiye, who somehow beat the USA 3–2 — mate, you're being carried by a nation of 85 million and a goalkeeper's prayer.

Norway are owned by basically everyone — Al, Butters, Callum, Croft, and Wilmot all have a slice — so today's Norway vs France clash in Group I is either a beautiful communal moment or a sweepstake civil war, since Callum, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman are all on France too. Someone's getting cucked either way.

Ellis — who has New Zealand sitting on 1 point in Group G going up against Belgium today — is genuinely one bad result away from her entire squad being a footnote. Tough tournament to be you, you fuck.
Watch Uruguay vs Spain in Group H — Croft desperately needs a point from Uruguay while Jim needs Spain to keep winning, so those two should be absolutely at each other's throats by half time.
